title: SupersLegend
description: A Legend of Zelda Mod with elements from across the series such as ALTTP, OOT, MM, TP, BOTW and more!
body:
This Zelda Mod contains several items from the Legend of Zelda Series such as Ocarina of Time, Majora's mask, A link to the past, and more to come.

With this mod comes many different items from the zelda series, these things includes but is not limited to..

- Armors
- Swords
- Tools
- Magic Items
- Magic Tools
- Decoration Blocks
